title: The Crew Reaches the Floating Restaurant Baratie
description: On pages 15–18, the crew reaches the floating restaurant Baratie, where Luffy’s impulsiveness, Fullbody’s arrogance, and Sanji’s sharp code collide.
scene: The Baratie is loud, violent, and rule-bound: cooks fight like pirates, customers cause trouble, and Sanji’s character begins to emerge through conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: A pleasure to meet you, miss.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: How about you and I share a glass of wine over there?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Our selection of wine is excellent.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Well...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hey!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Is it customary for this restaurant to serve its soup with insects!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: In- SECTS...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Heh heh. I put this bug in the soup myself... this is what you get for embarrassing me earlier on...! I'm gonna ruin this restaurant's reputation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's this damn bug in my soup!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: pardon me, sir...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But I'm afraid I do not know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm not very knowledgeable about the many types of insects, you see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: kyaaaa!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Seems like you have no idea who you're dealing with...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now, now, sir.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Can't you still eat this soup as long as I remove the bug?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What did you say!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm a paying customer!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: For a damn cook, aren't you quite full of yourself!?

dialogue.speaker: Fullbody
dialogue.text: FULLBODY, STOP!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just forgive him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Can money... fill your stomach up?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Agh! We have to stop him!

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Stop the Assistant Head Chef Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: full- body...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Remember this... going against a cook on the seas,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is tantamount to Suicide...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't you dare waste food...

summary: This part introduces the Baratie as more than a restaurant; it is a battlefield of pride, hunger, and harsh principles that will define Sanji’s arc.
